overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a walk through a neon-lit futuristic downtown district. The player navigates busy streets with flying cars and neon signage, turns into a narrow alley with stairs, and emerges into an open plaza beneath elevated highways.

scene_state.functional_zone: neon-lit commercial boulevard with elevated highway

events.description: futuristic black sedan drives past on the right
slowing down and preparing to turn right at intersection

agents.ego_description: walking along the right sidewalk of a busy downtown street, passing neon signs and palm trees

notable_agents.action: futuristic sedan driving down the street, passing the camera

entered.detail: large blue neon sign reading 'HO-TEL' on building facade
massive concrete overpass with vehicles traveling overhead
tall palm tree on sidewalk median
large digital billboard with purple and pink neon graphics

segments.scene_description: Walking along a bustling cyberpunk boulevard shaded by an elevated highway. Neon signs and digital billboards illuminate the street while futuristic vehicles pass by. The sidewalk is moderately crowded with pedestrians walking in various directions.

events.description: turns right off main street into narrow alleyway between buildings
begins ascending concrete stairs between green industrial walls

agents.ego_description: turning right into a narrow passage and climbing concrete stairs between tall industrial buildings

entered.detail: wide concrete stairs with red painted edges leading upward
dark green metal paneling on building exterior with horizontal lines
confined walkway between tall buildings with pipes and utility boxes
purple and yellow automated vending machine with glowing display

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions from the open boulevard into a narrow, enclosed service alley. The camera turns right and ascends a concrete stairway flanked by green industrial walls. The space is tight and utilitarian, with exposed pipes and a vending machine visible along the wall.

scene_state.functional_zone: open plaza with tree under elevated highway

events.description: emerges from narrow alley into sunlit open plaza with large tree
approaches crosswalk with traffic barriers and passing vehicles

agents.ego_description: walking through an open plaza area toward a crosswalk beneath an elevated highway ramp

notable_agents.action: person walking ahead toward the crosswalk

entered.detail: mature leafy tree in concrete planter providing shade to the plaza
spacious pedestrian area with patterned pavement and planters
zebra crossing stripes on the road surface
yellow and orange striped barriers blocking vehicle access

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the confined alley into a bright, open plaza dominated by a large tree. The space opens up significantly with full sky visibility and natural sunlight. The camera approaches a crosswalk beneath an elevated highway ramp, with traffic barriers visible and vehicles passing in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: downtown commercial street with neon signage

events.description: crosses the street at crosswalk and continues along opposite sidewalk
turns slightly left to follow the sidewalk curve along the street

agents.ego_description: crossing the street and continuing down a busy sidewalk lined with towering buildings and neon advertisements

notable_agents.action: futuristic car driving along the street parallel to the sidewalk

entered.detail: tall building covered with multiple large digital billboards and neon pink lighting
towering glass and steel buildings with holographic advertisements
wide pedestrian walkway with red painted curb

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows the camera crossing the street and proceeding along another busy downtown sidewalk. Towering skyscrapers covered in neon billboards and holographic advertisements line the street. The elevated highway remains visible in the distance while moderate traffic and pedestrians fill the scene.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a bustling neon boulevard through a confined industrial passage and back into a sprawling futuristic cityscape. It begins by moving along a crowded sidewalk shaded by an elevated highway, where digital billboards and passing vehicles cast a vibrant glow over the pedestrians. The camera then turns right, shifting from the open street into a narrow service alley and ascending a concrete stairway flanked by green walls and exposed piping. As the camera emerges from this tight space, the environment opens up into a bright, sunlit plaza centered around a large tree and a crosswalk beneath a highway ramp. Finally, the view expands once more as the camera crosses the street to navigate another busy downtown sidewalk lined with towering skyscrapers and holographic advertisements.
